items.name: constructive-theme
items.title: Constructive Theme
items.description: Constructive design system theme — OKLCH colors, z-index layers, shadow utilities, and animations.

theme.--font-mono: var(--font-geist-mono, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace)

css.@keyframes pulse-glow: 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.95); } 50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05); }
css.@keyframes fade-scale-in: from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
css.@keyframes scale-in: from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
css.@keyframes slide-up: from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
css.@keyframes command-in: from { opacity: 0; scale: 0.98; } to { opacity: 1; scale: 1; }
css.@keyframes command-out: from { opacity: 1; scale: 1; } to { opacity: 0; scale: 0.98; }

items.name: storage
items.title: Storage Kit
items.description: Shared foundation for the Storage UI kit: domain types, pure formatters, and the stateless leaf components (file-type icon, visibility/status badges, breadcrumb, object toolbar) the other storage blocks build on.

items.name: storage-bucket-rail
items.title: Storage Bucket Rail
items.description: Vertical, scrollable list of buckets with visibility badges, object counts, and a pinned New bucket action. Stateless: selection is controlled.

items.name: storage-object-table
items.title: Storage Object Table
items.description: The object browser table: controlled sort and selection, per-row actions, a skeleton loading state, and an empty-body message.

items.name: storage-upload-dropzone
items.title: Storage Upload Dropzone
items.description: A presentational drag-and-drop target with a Browse button and an in-flight upload progress list. Upload behavior is delegated to the parent.

items.name: storage-object-detail-sheet
items.title: Storage Object Detail Sheet
items.description: Right-side detail panel for a single object: image or file-type preview, a metadata list, inline rename, and primary actions with a confirmed delete.

items.name: storage-bucket-config-sheet
items.title: Storage Bucket Config Sheet
items.description: Create or edit a bucket via a right-side Sheet form: key, visibility, custom-key/MIME/size/origin controls, and a description, gated to the host schema's real columns.

items.name: storage-empty-state
items.title: Storage Empty State
items.description: Centered empty/zero states for the storage surface — no buckets, not provisioned, empty bucket, or no access — each with an icon, copy, and a primary action.

items.name: storage-browser
items.title: Storage Browser
items.description: Master/detail page composition: a bucket rail on the left and an object browser on the right (header, toolbar, breadcrumb, table, and empty states). Composes the full storage kit.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Form field wrapper with label, description, and error message. Works standalone without any form library.

items.name: form-kit
items.title: Form Kit
items.description: All form-related components: input, textarea, checkbox, radio, select, switch, progress, form controls.

items.name: overlay-kit
items.title: Overlay Kit
items.description: All overlay components: dialog, sheet, drawer, popover, tooltip, dropdown menu, alert dialog.

items.name: layout-kit
items.title: Layout Kit
items.description: Layout and navigation components: tabs, sidebar, collapsible, resizable panels, scroll area, breadcrumb, pagination.
